Defines a custom type for ActivityType with a max size of 36 characters, including UUID format.

# Purpose
The configuration specifies a maximum size of 36 characters for a custom type in the `pebble.pipeline.ActivityType`. This size accommodates a UUID format, which consists of 32 alphanumeric characters and up to 4 optional dashes, following the pattern 8-4-4-4-12.
